news.title: Trump says U.S. will destroy Iran’s oil wells, Kharg Island without deal to 'immediately' reopen Hormuz Strait

news.title: My PayPal account received money from the Philippines with two phone numbers listed. I called them. Big mistake.
news.title_cn: 我的 PayPal 帳戶收到了來自菲律賓的資金，並列出了兩個電話號碼。我打電話給他們。大錯誤。

news.title: Sysco goes all in on the ‘cash and carry’ food-service business with a $29 billion buyout
